name: codex-bridge
description: Local multi-model gateway and desktop manager for Codex.
author: CodexBridge contributors

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check scripts/generate-catalog.js && node --check scripts/desktop-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/package-windows.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-packaged-windows.mjs && node --check scripts/package-macos.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-packaged-macos.mjs && node --check desktop/data-dir.cjs && node --check desktop/presets.mjs && node --check desktop/router-health.mjs && node --check desktop/settings.mjs && node --check desktop/usage.mjs && node --check desktop/main.cjs && node --check desktop/preload.cjs && node --check desktop/renderer/app.js && node --test tests/*.test.js
